title: Shipping Costs to Rise as Iran Conflict Continues, Maersk Boss Warns
summary: The cost of shipping will rise due to the ongoing conflict in Iran, with the boss of Maersk warning that traditional contracting mechanisms will pass on fuel price fluctuations to customers.

title: Meta Urged to Boost Oversight of Fake AI Videos
summary: Meta's Oversight Board has called on the company to boost oversight of fake AI videos on its platforms, citing concerns about the proliferation of such content during global military conflicts.
